title: ixora humilis
intro: Ixora humilis, also known as the dwarf ixora or forest ixora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, Ixora humilis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to utilize its medicinal properties.
